name: Node.js Custom (Universal Pro)
author: dapaupau@sigaul.com
description: Pro-tier Node.js egg by YuraCloud. Optimized for performance, auto-updates, and full customization.
startup: if [ -d .git ] && [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then git pull; fi; if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install --production --no-audit --no-fund; fi; export NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=$(($SERVER_MEMORY - 64)) --use-openssl-ca"; exec ${CMD_RUN}
